_status_doc: Placeholder. `markers[]` is intentionally empty. Consumers MUST treat _status='stub' as 'registry not yet populated' and either fall back to ai/core/SECTION_MARKERS.md or fail loud — never silently treat the empty array as 'no markers exist'.
_schema_doc: Machine-readable sidecar for ai/core/SECTION_MARKERS.md. Until Step 0 of the migration plan lands, this is a stub so cross-references resolve; the markdown table is authoritative.

_field_descriptions.writer: string (skill or agent that emits the section)
_field_descriptions.readers: array<string> (skills, hooks, agents that consume it)
_field_descriptions.location: string (artifact file path, relative to <artifact-root>/tasks/<task_id>/[phase-X/]<subtask_id>/ unless noted)
